name: Chorizo & Mozzarella Arancini
subtitle: Lemon & Thyme Aioli · Romesco
label: Arancini - Large
method_steps: Sauté finely diced brown onion over medium heat until golden. Add crushed garlic and chorizo, cook 1–2 minutes until chorizo browns. Deglaze with white wine.
Add rice, spicy capsicum dip, onion/garlic/chorizo mix to a deep bain. Cover with water and chicken stock concentrate, salt and pepper. Stir to combine.
Cover bain with lid. Bake at 160°C for 20 minutes, stir, then bake another 20 minutes until water is fully absorbed.
Transfer rice to a bain-marie and refrigerate (or freeze) until fully cooled.
Grate all three cheeses. Stir into cooled rice along with diced roasted capsicum until fully incorporated.
Weigh rice into 50g portions and roll into balls.
Set up coating station: beaten eggs, GF flour, GF breadcrumbs. Roll balls in flour, dip in egg, coat thoroughly in breadcrumbs.
Place on parchment-lined tray and freeze until solid. Vacuum seal (SEAL ONLY — do not vacuum to avoid squashing). Defrost in fridge 24 hours before service.
service: Deep fry arancini until heated through — check with skewer. Season immediately with salt flakes.
Warm Romesco on stove or in microwave.
Place ½ cup warm Romesco as base on each plate. Arrange 3 arancini on top.
Add a dot of Lemon Thyme Aioli on each arancini. Garnish with freshly cut microherbs.
note: DO NOT vacuum seal — seal only. Defrost minimum 24 hours in fridge before frying.

name: Calamari Fritti
subtitle: Lemon Dill Aioli · Crispy Capers
label: Calamari
method_steps: STORAGE: When calamari and octopus arrive, portion immediately — 15 pieces calamari + 3 baby octopus per 500ml PC. Label, store in freezer crate labelled Calamari.
FLOUR MIX: Combine rice flour, GF corn flour, salt, pepper and lemon pepper seasoning. Mix thoroughly, transfer to labelled PCs, store in fridge.
CAPERS: Drain thoroughly and pat dry with chux. Store in PC lined with chux to absorb excess moisture. Refrigerate.
service: Heat oil in fryers. Fry capers 30 seconds – 1 minute until crispy. Drain on chux-lined bowl.
Coat calamari strips and baby octopus evenly in flour mix.
Fry calamari immediately for ~1 minute until crispy. Do not overcrowd basket.
Season with pinch of salt while hot.
TAPAS: Base of 1–2 tbsp lemon dill aioli. Arrange calamari and baby octopus on top. Sprinkle crispy capers, garnish with microgreens.
CANAPE: Small dot of aioli in bamboo boat. Calamari on top, finish with crispy capers.

name: Kilpatrick Oysters
subtitle: Crispy Speck · Lea & Perrins · Rock Salt
label: Oysters Kilpatrick
method_steps: OYSTERS: Remove from freezer 24 hours before event and defrost in fridge. Finely dice speck into PC, refrigerate.
KILPATRICK SAUCE: Mix GF Worcestershire, BBQ sauce, tabasco and dried parsley. Decant into squeezy bottle and label.
GARNISH: Slice lemons, store in labelled PC in fridge.
service: Bunch aluminium foil into a bain tray so oysters can be pressed in and held stable.
Arrange oysters on foil-lined tray. Add 1–2 tsp Kilpatrick sauce onto each oyster. Add 1 tsp diced speck per oyster.
Bake at 180°C for 10 minutes or until golden.
Spread rock salt ~1 inch thick on serving tray. Place baked oysters on salt. Garnish with rocket/microgreens and lemon slices.

name: Slow Cooked Veal Meatballs
subtitle: Romesco Sugo · Toasted Focaccia · Gremolata
label: Meatballs
method_steps: Blitz onion and garlic in food processor. Mix into breadcrumbs — squeeze so onion juices wet the crumbs.
Combine breadcrumb mix with veal mince, parmesan, cream, salt, pepper and herbs. Mix thoroughly.
Wet hands to prevent sticking. Roll mixture into 80g balls.
Place meatballs in deep bain, cover generously with romesco sauce.
Bake in preheated oven at 150°C for 1 hour. Allow to cool in sauce before portioning.
Store in round or rectangle PCs in serves of 3. Distribute romesco across all serves. Label and freeze in crate labelled Meatballs.
service: Reheat in microwave. Check internal temperature and continue heating if needed.
Place reheated meatballs and sauce in medium serving bowl.
Toast 3× 2cm thick focaccia slices until golden on both sides.
Top with thinly grated Manchego and gremolata.
note: Prep time ~45 mins per 90 balls.

name: Lemon Pepper Chicken Skewer
subtitle: Herbed Labneh · Crumbled Feta · Microherbs
label: Chicken Skewers
method_steps: Combine oil, lemon pepper, limoncello, lemon juice/zest, honey and thyme. Dice chicken into 1-inch pieces and coat in marinade.
Thread 3 pieces per 12cm wooden skewer. Refrigerate overnight in bain-marie if possible. Store in 500ml PCs (1 serve = 3 skewers), freeze.
LABNEH: Line holy bain with 3× chux. Add yogurt on top, cover with more chux. Hang overnight in fridge.
Once hung, mix labneh with finely chopped parsley, dill, mint, lemon zest and finely diced cucumber (no seeds). Season with lemon juice, salt and pepper. Refrigerate.
service: Preheat oven to 180°C.
Lay skewers flat on tray (not overlapping). Roast 10 minutes.
Place a heaped tablespoon of herbed labneh in centre of plate. Arrange 3 skewers. Add crumbled feta and green microherb garnish.

name: Crispy Fried Chorizo Potatoes
subtitle: Lemon Thyme Aioli · Shallots
label: Chorizo Potatoes
method_steps: Bake potatoes at 180°C for 35–40 minutes until soft. Cool.
Smash cooled potatoes into uneven pieces — aim for 6–8 pieces per large potato.
Store potato pieces in labelled PCs, refrigerate.
Slice chorizo lengthwise then cut 5mm wide at 45° angle. Slice shallots thinly at 45°. Store separately in labelled PCs.
service: Deep fry cooled potato pieces until crispy.
Add chorizo slices to basket and cook 20–30 seconds.
Transfer to large metal bowl. Add mayo and sliced shallots, season to taste, toss to coat.
Serve 4–5 pieces in bamboo boats with bamboo fork.

name: Chargrilled Lamb Cutlet
subtitle: Riviera House Emulsion · Rocket
label: Lamb Cutlets
method_steps: French the cutlets. Season generously with salt and pepper.
Two days before event: place in bain lined with clean chux, cover, label, refrigerate.
service: Heat large frying pan. Sear each side of cutlets until nicely coloured.
Transfer to bain, bake in oven 10 minutes at 180°C.
Lay bed of rocket on small plate. Arrange 3 cutlets neatly on top.
Generously drizzle Riviera House Emulsion over cutlets, ensuring each is well-coated.
note: Season cutlets two days before event for best flavour development.

name: Crispy Reef Fish Slider
subtitle: Lemon Caper Aioli · Rocket · Brioche
label: Fish Slider
method_steps: Defrost fish in fridge 2 days before event. Cut into ~70g pieces the day before.
BATTER: Mix flour, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, pepper. Whisk in cold sparkling water until pancake-batter consistency. Add vodka and mix to combine.
PART COOK: Preheat deep fryer. Dip fish in batter, shake off excess, fry in batches of 5–6 for ~1 minute to seal batter only. Drain on wire rack.
Store part-cooked fish in bain-marie lined with baking paper, single layer. Wrap, label, refrigerate.
LEMON CAPER AIOLI: Strain and dry capers, zest lemons. Combine capers, lemon zest, mayo, salt and pepper. Adjust seasoning, refrigerate in PC.
BRIOCHE: Remove from freezer, separate tops/bottoms, store in fridge wrapped in glad wrap.
service: Warm brioche at 170°C for 10 minutes.
Finish frying part-cooked fish until golden and crispy.
Place brioche base on platter, add small handful of rocket. Place fish on rocket. Add generous amount of lemon caper aioli.
Top with brioche lid, secure with skewer.

name: Beef Kofta
subtitle: Spicy Capsicum Sauce · Pita · Rocket
label: Beef Kofta
method_steps: Sauté finely diced onion and garlic until translucent.
Combine beef mince, browned onion/garlic, finely chopped mint, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, pepper, paprika and salt. Mix thoroughly.
Fry 1 tbsp of mix to taste. Adjust seasoning.
Roll mince into 50g balls, shape into football shape.
Lay in bain-marie lined with baking paper. Cover and freeze.
Vacuum seal 40 koftas per bag. Label and return to freezer. Defrost 24 hours before use.
PITA: Defrost 24 hours ahead. Cut in half, line in bain-marie, cover and refrigerate.
Finely chop parsley and mint, store in labelled PC.
service: Bake koftas in bain at 180°C for 20 minutes.
Warm pita at 170°C for 10 minutes.
Open pita, place in large bamboo boat. Add small amount of rocket, then a kofta.
Top with dollop of spicy capsicum sauce and chopped herbs. Arrange neatly on platter.

name: Camembert, Pecan & Cranberry Cigars
subtitle: Thyme Infused Honey · Microherbs
label: Camembert Cigars
method_steps: Melt butter. Cut camembert into 1cm thick × 10cm long sticks. Finely chop pecans and cranberries.
Lay 2 sheets filo on clean surface, brush top with melted butter. Cut sheets in half lengthwise, then each half into 3 long strips.
Place cheese on narrow end of each strip, add 1 tsp pecan/cranberry mix. Fold sides in and roll tightly like a spring roll.
Freeze on parchment-lined tray until solid. Vacuum seal for storage. Defrost in fridge 24 hours before use.
HONEY: Combine honey, thyme, salt and cinnamon stick in pot. Warm over low heat, simmer 10 minutes. Transfer to PC and allow to continue infusing.
service: Deep fry cigars ~2 minutes until golden brown.
Arrange on platter. Drizzle with thyme-infused honey.
Garnish with chopped pecans, cranberries, microgreens and edible flowers.

name: Romesco
subtitle: House Sauce
label: Romesco
method_steps: Heat olive oil in pan. Sauté onions and garlic until translucent.
Blend sautéed onions/garlic with capsicum, passata, basil, salt, pepper and a pinch of sugar until smooth.
Pour into large pot and simmer 1.5–2 hours until flavours develop. Taste and adjust.
Portion into PCs, label and freeze. Remove from freezer as needed.
service: Heat on stovetop or microwave until hot. Use as base or accompany as needed.

name: Lemon Dill Aioli
subtitle: House component
label: Lemon Dill Aioli
method_steps: Finely chop dill and place in a bowl.
Remove lemon rind with microplane, juice lemons.
Combine dill, lemon zest, mayonnaise, salt and pepper in a bowl. Mix well.
Taste and adjust seasoning. Transfer to a PC, label and refrigerate.
service: Serve with Calamari Fritti (tapas or canapé) or as needed.

name: Lemon Thyme Aioli
subtitle: House component
label: Lemon Thyme Aioli
method_steps: Pick thyme leaves into a bowl.
Remove lemon rind with microplane, juice lemons.
Combine thyme leaves, lemon zest, mayonnaise, salt and pepper in a bowl. Mix well.
Taste and adjust seasoning. Transfer to a PC, label and refrigerate.
service: Serve with arancini, chorizo potatoes, or as needed.

name: Vodka Sauce
subtitle: Uses Romesco
label: Vodka Sauce
method_steps: Add all ingredients to a pot. Simmer on the stove until thick and rich.
Label and store as needed.
service: Heat and use as a sauce base or accompaniment.

name: Whipped Butter
subtitle: Bread service
label: Whipped Butter
method_steps: Whip butter until light, white and fluffy.
Place in a piping bag with large star nozzle. Pipe onto small plates and refrigerate.
service: Serve with breads.

name: Riviera House Emulsion
subtitle: House Sauce
label: Emulsion
method_steps: Peel lemon rind with potato peeler, juice lemons. Trim coriander roots, roughly chop all herbs.
In food processor, combine apricots, dill, coriander, parsley, lemon juice/zest, red wine vinegar, olive oil, jalapeños, garlic, castor sugar, salt and pepper.
Blend until smooth. Taste and adjust salt/sugar to balance.
Transfer to PC, label and refrigerate. For bulk: add olive oil over top before freezing to prevent freezer burn.
service: Serve cold or room temperature. Drizzle generously over protein.
note: Add extra olive oil on top before freezing to prevent freezer burn.

name: Labneh Tzatziki
subtitle: Grated Cucumber · Pickled Cucumber · Lemon
label: Labneh Tzatziki
method_steps: Grate cucumber, lightly salt and rest 10 minutes, then squeeze out excess moisture.
Combine labneh, grated cucumber, diced pickled cucumber, red onion, brown onion and grated garlic.
Add olive oil, lemon juice and lemon zest. Season with salt and white pepper.
Mix until uniform, taste and adjust seasoning. Keep chilled until service.
service: Use for chicken skewer, lamb, platters or canape garnish.
Hold chilled and stir before service.
note: Scaled from the 3 kg house batch.

name: Pickled Cucumber Brine
subtitle: Apple Cider Vinegar · Seeded Mustard · Dill
label: Cucumber Brine
method_steps: Combine water, apple cider vinegar, mustard seed, white pepper, table salt, sugar, MSG and bay leaves in a pot.
Bring to a brief simmer just to dissolve seasoning, then remove from heat.
Add dill sprigs whole and cool completely.
Pour over cucumbers, keep submerged and refrigerate until pickled.
service: Use pickled cucumber in labneh tzatziki and garnish applications.
note: House batch targets approximately 6 cucumbers.

name: Sweet Thyme Chicken Marinade
subtitle: Honey · Limoncello · Lemon · Garlic
label: Chicken Marinade
method_steps: Whisk honey, limoncello, olive oil, lemon zest, lemon juice and garlic paste until combined.
Add thyme, salt and black pepper, then whisk again.
Coat 1 kg chicken thoroughly and refrigerate 6-12 hours before cooking.
service: Best for skewers, grilled thigh or breast pieces.
For breast use shorter marination; for thigh can hold up to 24 hours chilled.
note: House ratio: 1 nip limoncello per 1 kg chicken.

name: Lamb Citrus Herb Brine
subtitle: Rosemary · Thyme · Garlic · Lemon
label: Lamb Brine
method_steps: Dissolve salt and sugar in 1 L hot water.
Add garlic, rosemary, thyme and sliced lemons.
Add 4 L chilled water to cool the brine fully before use.
Submerge lamb completely and brine refrigerated for 24 hours.
service: Drain lamb, pat dry and temper before grilling or roasting.
Discard used brine after one batch.
note: Batch is set for 5 kg lamb over 24 hours.

name: Date Madeleines
subtitle: Scaled Date Batter · 160°C · 14 Minutes
label: Date Madeleines
method_steps: Combine chopped dates, baking soda and boiling water. Rest until softened and slightly cooled.
Cream brown sugar and softened butter, then beat in eggs one at a time.
Fold in flour and baking powder, then fold through the date mixture.
Pipe or spoon into prepared madeleine trays and bake at 160°C for 14 minutes.
service: Cool on trays briefly, then transfer to racks.
Store airtight once fully cooled.
note: Scaled from the 280 g date house formula.

name: Kilpatrick Sauce
subtitle: BBQ · Worcestershire · Smoked Paprika · Brown Sugar
label: Kilpatrick Sauce
method_steps: Combine BBQ sauce, Worcestershire sauce, brown sugar, smoked paprika and chilli flakes in a saucepan.
Simmer gently for 5-8 minutes, whisking until glossy and lightly thickened.
Cool before decanting to squeeze bottle or storage container.
service: Use for Kilpatrick oysters or as smoky-spicy glaze component.
note: Set to a mild-medium heat profile.

name: Calamari Flour Mix
subtitle: Rice Flour · Corn Flour · Lemon Pepper
label: Calamari Flour Mix
method_steps: Weigh ingredients by ratio and combine thoroughly until even.
Store in airtight labelled container in a dry, cool area.
Coat calamari immediately before frying for best crunch.
service: Shake excess flour before dropping into fryer oil.
note: House ratio recipe. Scale up or down by part size.

name: House Chip Seasoning
subtitle: Chicken Salt · Lemon Pepper · Smoked Paprika · MSG
label: Chip Seasoning
method_steps: Weigh each ingredient into a dry bowl.
Whisk until colour and texture are completely uniform.
Transfer to airtight labelled dry-store container; total batch is 2.1 kg.
service: Season chips immediately after frying while still hot.
note: House ratio batch: 600 g chicken salt, 50 g MSG, 100 g cracked black pepper, 50 g smoked paprika, 50 g cumin, 70 g garlic powder, 30 g oregano, 150 g lemon pepper, 900 g table salt, 100 g sugar. Scale proportionally as needed.

name: Heritage Chip Seasoning
subtitle: Chicken Salt Forward · Citrus Pepper Lift
label: Heritage Chip Seasoning
method_steps: Combine all weighed ingredients in a dry bowl.
Whisk until colour and texture are uniform.
Transfer to airtight 500 g seasoning container and label.
service: Season chips immediately after frying while still hot.
note: Previous house chip mix (500 g batch) kept for reference; replaced on the main card by the current 2.1 kg house ratio.

name: Reef Fish Batter
subtitle: Sparkling Water · Seasoned Flour · Vodka
label: Reef Fish Batter
method_steps: Combine flour, salt flakes, cracked pepper, garlic powder and onion powder.
Whisk in cold sparkling water to pancake-batter consistency.
Add vodka and mix briefly until just combined.
Use immediately for reef fish pieces before deep frying.
service: Keep batter cold and whisk lightly between batches.
note: Extracted from the Crispy Reef Fish Slider built-in recipe as a standalone prep card.

name: Mild Hot Honey
subtitle: Thyme · Chilli Flakes · Lemon
label: Hot Honey
method_steps: Warm honey gently with chilli flakes, thyme and lemon zest for 10 minutes over low heat. Do not boil.
Rest off heat for 15-20 minutes to infuse.
Strain if preferred, then stir in lemon juice to taste.
Cool fully and store in clean sealed container.
service: Use as mild sweet-heat drizzle for proteins, canapes and platters.
note: Mild heat profile by request.

name: Charcuterie Board
subtitle: Salami · Prosciutto · Blue · Brie · Crackers
label: Charcuterie Board
method_steps: Slice and portion meats and cheeses to service size.
Arrange cheeses first, then fold meats around them for balance.
Fill gaps with dried fruit, fresh grapes and crackers.
Hold chilled until service.
service: Temper cheeses briefly before serving for best flavour.
note: Ingredient-led house board spec.

name: Nibble Platter
subtitle: 40 Pieces · 10/10/10/10 Split
label: Nibble Platter
method_steps: Bake or reheat each item as per product spec until hot and crisp.
Hold hot for short service windows or cool for room-temp platter style as required.
Assemble platter in a 10/10/10/10 split.
service: Serve as one 40-piece mixed nibble platter.
note: Set split confirmed: 10 sausage rolls, 10 spinach pizzinis, 10 beef pies, 10 quiche Lorraine.

name: Bruschetta of Rare Roast Beef
subtitle: Charred Sourdough · Horseradish Cream · Pickled Shallot
label: Beef Bruschetta

ingredients.prep: sear rare, slice paper-thin across grain
fine rings, quick pickle 20 min in vinegar + pinch salt

method_steps: CROSTINI: Slice sourdough, brush lightly with oil, char on grill or hot pan until marked. Cool on rack.
HORSERADISH CREAM: Whisk cream to soft peaks, fold in horseradish and vinegar. Season. Hold chilled in PC.
BEEF: Season striploin, sear hard on all faces, rest 8 minutes, slice as thin as possible across grain. Hold lightly covered — service same day.
PICKLED SHALLOT: Slice shallots, cover with vinegar and a pinch of salt; drain before service.
ASSEMBLY: Spread thin horseradish cream on crostini, drape beef, top with shallot rings and chives.
service: Room-temp canapé: plate on slate or board; finish with flaky salt at pass.
Hold assembled no more than 20 minutes before pass to keep bread crisp.
note: Event canapé spec — scale beef 20g raw weight per piece equivalent.

name: Spanner Crab Cannoli
subtitle: Citrus · Dill · Crisp Shell
label: Crab Cannoli
method_steps: FILLING: Fold crab with cream cheese, lemon juice, dill, tabasco. Season. Pipe into piping bag, hold chilled 2 hours max before fill.
SHELLS: Fry shells if raw pastry type per supplier spec; cool completely before filling.
PIPE: Fill both ends of each shell just before service for maximum crunch.
service: Pass on trays with microherb garnish; lemon cheek on side of tray.
note: If shells soften, under-fill and refresh garnish only.

name: Prawn Brioche Slider
subtitle: Cocktail Sauce · Lettuce · Potato Crisp
label: Prawn Slider
method_steps: SAUCE: Whisk mayo, ketchup, Worcestershire, lemon — cocktail sauce. Hold chilled.
PRAWNS: Toss with oil and seasoning, grill or hot pan 90 seconds per side until just opaque. Chill quickly if holding cold.
BUN: Warm brioche 170°C 4 minutes. Cool slightly before build.
BUILD: Base bun, sauce, cos, prawn, pinch crushed crisps, lid skewer.
service: Hot pass: grill prawns to order if possible; otherwise warm prawns gently in oven with steam cover off.
note: Sister build to reef fish slider — prawn variant for catering packages.

name: Smoked Chicken & Bacon Brioche Slider
subtitle: Aioli · Rocket
label: Chicken Bacon Slider

ingredients.prep: smoke or roast with smoke dust

method_steps: CHICKEN: Roast thigh to 75°C internal, cool, shred coarse. Season.
AIOLI: Mix mayo, garlic, salt — hold chilled.
ASSEMBLY: Toast buns lightly. Base aioli, rocket, chicken, bacon crumb, lid.
service: Serve warm; bacon added at last second for crunch.

name: Vintage Beef Brioche Slider
subtitle: Aged Cheddar · Tomato Relish · Rocket
label: Beef Slider
method_steps: PATTY: Flatten 50g balls, grill or pan to medium, rest on tray with cheddar on top to melt slightly.
BUN: Warm buns.
BUILD: Relish on base, rocket, patty with cheese, lid.
service: Hot hold max 15 minutes under cloche for texture.

name: Mini Beefburger Canapé
subtitle: Aged Cheddar · Herbed Aioli · Tomato Relish · Rocket
label: Mini Burger
method_steps: HERBED AIOLI: Fold herbs through mayo, season.
PATTY: 25g balls, smash-cook or small ring mould to 6cm rounds.
ASSEMBLY: Toasted bun, aioli, relish, rocket, patty, cheese, lid pick.
service: Bamboo pick mandatory for cocktail service.

name: Beef Polpette
subtitle: Glaze or Sugo · Parmesan
label: Polpette

ingredients.prep: reduced glaze or use romesco sugo line

method_steps: Mix mince, parmesan, cooled onion, garlic, crumbs, eggs, seasoning. Roll 25g balls.
Bake 180°C 12 minutes until coloured; glaze with reduced passata; finish parmesan.
service: Toothpick or bamboo boat; extra glaze in squeeze bottle at pass.
note: Smaller format than slow-cooked veal meatballs; can share romesco line if desired.

name: Slow Cooked Lamb Shoulder Provençale
subtitle: Moroccan Couscous · Harissa Yoghurt
label: Lamb Shoulder Plate
method_steps: HARISSA YOGHURT: Whisk yoghurt, harissa, lemon zest/juice, salt to taste. Hold chilled 24h max in PC.
COUSCOUS: Bloom couscous with hot stock, butter, sultanas, almonds, ras el hanout — fluff with fork. Hold hot box.
LAMB: Rub shoulder with oil, herbs, salt. Sear all sides. Add tomato paste, wine, reduce slightly, add stock to half-cover. Cover foil, 150°C 5–6 hours until pulling.
PICK lamb, reduce jus on stove, adjust seasoning. Shred or slice for service.
PLATE: Base couscous, lamb, drizzle jus, quenelle yoghurt, extra harissa dots optional.
service: Family or individual: keep yoghurt cold until last moment.
note: Composite card — all three components specified in one modal per house policy.

name: Beef Bourguignon
subtitle: Red Wine · Bacon · Mushroom · Carrot
label: Beef Bourguignon
method_steps: Sear beef in batches, reserve. Render bacon, add mushrooms colour, add onion carrot.
Stir tomato paste, add wine, reduce by third. Add stock, herbs, beef back. Simmer covered 3h low until tender.
Reduce sauce, thicken lightly with cornflour slurry if needed. Adjust salt.
service: Hold hot in bain; parsley garnish.

name: Creamy Lemon Caper Chicken
subtitle: Thyme · White Wine · Cream
label: Lemon Caper Chicken
method_steps: Pan-sear chicken skin-side until golden, flip, finish to 74°C internal. Rest half, slice for buffet if needed.
Sauce: deglaze pan with wine, reduce, add cream, lemon zest/juice, capers, thyme. Simmer to nappe.
Return chicken to sauce or nap over slices.
service: Sauce split if holding — refresh with splash cream at pass.
note: Shares flavour lane with lemon dill aioli for cold applications if repurposed.

name: Natural Oysters with Champagne Mignonette
subtitle: Shucked · Chilled · Mignonette
label: Natural Oysters

ingredients.prep: shucked to order or HACCP window per SOP

ingredients.item: Champagne Vinegar or White Wine Vinegar

method_steps: MIGNONETTE: Combine champagne, vinegar, shallot, pepper, sugar. Rest 30 minutes. Hold chilled.
Oysters: shuck into deep half-shell, check for shell, store on crushed ice with flat side down.
service: Serve on ice with spoon of mignonette beside, not on oyster until guest chooses.
note: Separate from Kilpatrick — cold natural line.

name: Greek Spiced Roast Lamb Leg
subtitle: Oregano · Lemon · Garlic · Olive Oil
label: Greek Lamb Leg
method_steps: Score fat cap, rub marinade all over, marinate 24h chilled.
Roast 160°C to internal 62°C rest target ~58°C after rest for pink — adjust to house policy.
Rest 20 minutes, carve, finish with pan juices.
service: Carvery or plated; tzatziki line optional side.
note: Optional brine: see Lamb Citrus Herb Brine card for large-batch prep.

name: Creamy Potato Gratin
subtitle: Cream · Garlic · Golden Cheese Crust
label: Potato Gratin
method_steps: Rub deep tray with garlic, layer potato, season every layer, finish with cream+milk just covering top potato.
Bake 160°C covered 60m, uncover, cheese, bake 30m until blistered.
Rest 20m before portion — holds hot box 2h.
service: Square portions with offset spatula.

name: Garlic & Herb Chat Potatoes with Feta Cream
subtitle: Roast · Whipped Feta
label: Chat Potatoes
method_steps: Toss chats with oil, garlic, herbs, salt. Roast 200°C until golden and crisp outside.
Feta cream: blend feta with cream until pipeable, hold chilled.
service: Serve chats hot, quenelle feta cream on side or drizzle.

name: Broccoli & Cauliflower Gratin
subtitle: Béchamel · Cheese Crust
label: Veg Gratin
method_steps: Blanch florets 3 min, drain well.
Roux with butter and cornflour, cook out, whisk milk to thick béchamel, nutmeg, half cheese.
Fold veg, top with remaining cheese, bake 190°C 25m until golden.
service: Rest 10m before scoop — sauce sets slightly.

name: Prosciutto Wrapped Chicken Breast
subtitle: Potato · Greens · Lemon Caper Cream
label: Prosciutto Chicken
method_steps: Wrap each breast in prosciutto, sear colour, bake 180°C to 74°C internal.
Sauce: reduce cream with lemon and capers until coats spoon.
Potatoes: roast separately until crisp outside.
service: Slice chicken on bias, stack potato, greens, sauce nap.
note: Composite elements in one card for plated package.

name: Fillet of Beef with Tempranillo Reduction
subtitle: Potato · Greens
label: Beef Fillet

ingredients.prep: roast or gratin per event spec

method_steps: Sear fillet portions, oven finish to medium-rare policy, rest.
Reduction: shallot in pan, add wine reduce 80%, add stock reduce to glaze, mount butter, strain.
service: Slice fillet fan, sauce stripe, veg alongside.

name: Stuffed Mushroom with Romesco & Lemon Aioli
subtitle: Greens
label: Stuffed Mushroom

ingredients.prep: small cups, stems reserved for duxelles

method_steps: Roast cups 10m to drive moisture, fill with romesco mixed with parmesan and panko, bake 12m until golden.
Cool slightly, dot lemon aioli, pick of rocket.
service: Warm pass; vegan cheese swap if required.
note: Uses house romesco and lemon thyme aioli batches.

name: Roving Cannoli & Tiramisu Service
subtitle: Strawberry Ricotta · Tiramisu · Lemon Cheesecake
label: Roving Dessert
method_steps: STRAWBERRY RICOTTA: Beat ricotta with icing sugar, fold strawberry crumb. Pipe day-of.
TIRAMISU FILLING: Fold mascarpone with espresso, cocoa, almonds to pipeable.
LEMON CHEESECAKE: Blend ricotta, mascarpone, lemon zest, icing sugar until smooth.
ROVING: staff with gloved hands fill shells to order or 5-minute batches max.
service: Tray of mixed filled cannoli + napkins; alternate fillings on tray for visual.
note: Canape package add-on per Dec 2025 menu.

name: House Baked Scones Platter
subtitle: Chantilly Cream · Jam
label: Scone Platter

ingredients.prep: whipped with vanilla and icing sugar — Chantilly

method_steps: Bake scones per bakery SOP, cool 10m on rack.
Whip Chantilly to soft peaks, hold chilled.
Platter: pile scones, bowls of jam and cream, cloth napkin under basket aesthetic.
service: Self-serve wake style; refresh cream if warm room.
note: Funeral / wake platter line.

name: Sweet Slice & Cake Platter
subtitle: Chef Selection
label: Sweet Platter
method_steps: Cut uniform fingers, parchment between layers on platter.
Label allergens on card at front of platter.
service: Room temp 2h max; cover with dome when not in use.

name: Grazing Box
subtitle: Cheese · Deli · Fruit · Nuts · Crackers · Dips · Olives
label: Grazing Box
method_steps: Line box with greaseproof, build height back-left to low front-right.
Small pots for dips, ramekins for olives, cheese flags for IDs.
service: Transport flat; include tongs and napkins count.
note: Cross-train with charcuterie board spec for overlap.

name: Ham & Cheese Croissants Platter
subtitle: Baked · Butter Glaze
label: Ham Cheese Croissant
method_steps: Fill croissants, brush tops, bake 180°C 8m until cheese melts and pastry gold.
Cool 5m before platter so cheese sets.
service: Warm or room temp per client; label GF if using GF croissant line.

name: Sandwich Platter
subtitle: Chef Selection Fills
label: Sandwich Platter

ingredients.prep: crust on or off per spec

method_steps: Build finger sandwiches 3 fingers per serve, wrap cling until 1h before service.
Cut diagonal, pin with pick, arrange colour-balanced on platter.
service: Include dietary flags if mixed box.

name: Premium Filled Wraps Platter
subtitle: 12 Gourmet Wraps
label: Wrap Platter
method_steps: Tight roll, seam down, wrap tight in glad, chill 30m, slice bias into pinwheels or halves per client.
service: Cut fresh — do not hold sliced >2h.

name: Filled Brioche Rolls Platter
subtitle: Cold Protein Fills
label: Brioche Rolls
method_steps: Butter inside lightly, layer protein + slaw, close and wrap until service.
service: Halve on bias for display.

name: Roast Beef & Beetroot Balsamic Platter
subtitle: Sliced · Relish
label: Beef Platter
method_steps: Slice beef to order if possible; else slice 3mm, shingle on tray, relish in ramekin centre.
service: Tongs for beef, spoon for relish.

name: Dietary Grazing Platter
subtitle: GF · DF · Vegan · Egg-friendly Build
label: Dietary Grazing
method_steps: Segregated board — no shared knives with standard grazing.
Label clearly at 12 o'clock position.
service: Confirm allergen brief 48h prior.
note: Funeral PDF dietary platter analogue.

name: Savoury Filled Croissants
subtitle: Chef Breakfast Fills
label: Savoury Croissants

ingredients.prep: egg bacon cheese / ham cheese / spinach feta

method_steps: Fill, egg wash seam, bake 180°C until cheese melts and pastry hot through.
service: Box by the dozen for corporate morning tea.
note: Minimum 12 per PDF; GST ex per venue pricing sheet.

name: Sweet Filled Croissants
subtitle: Chef Sweet Fills
label: Sweet Croissants
method_steps: Pipe fill into split croissant or proof filled croissant per pastry chef SOP.
Dust icing sugar before send.

name: Mixed Bircher Muesli Bowls
subtitle: Yoghurt · Fruit
label: Bircher Bowls
method_steps: Soak oats in juice overnight, fold yoghurt and honey morning-of.
Top with fruit and nuts in compostable bowl with lid.
service: Keep chilled chain <5°C until handover.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad Bowl
subtitle: Cos · Parmesan · Dressing
label: Caesar Bowl
method_steps: Layer cos in bowl, chicken, dressing, parmesan, bacon if using.
Hold cold; dress not more than 20m before send to avoid wilt.

name: Lamb Fattoush Salad Bowl
subtitle: Herb Dressing · Pita Chip
label: Fattoush Bowl

ingredients.prep: toasted chips GF off if needed

method_steps: Dress salad lightly, top lamb, finish pita chips on top for crunch at send.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Bowl
subtitle: Pita · Tzatziki · Salad
label: Med Chicken Bowl
method_steps: Portion tzatziki in dip well, salad base, sliced chicken, pita on side.
note: Uses labneh tzatziki house card for dip.

name: Beef Lasagne with Side Salad
subtitle: Bake · Garden Salad
label: Lasagne Lunch
method_steps: Reheat lasagne covered 160°C until centre 75°C, rest 10m before portion.
Dress salad in separate container.
service: Two-compartment box if takeaway.

name: Breakfast Wraps
subtitle: Bacon Egg Cheese Hash Relish
label: Breakfast Wrap
method_steps: Warm tortilla, centre fills, fold burrito style, toast seam on press until marked.

name: Gourmet Filled Cookies
subtitle: Chef Selection
label: Filled Cookies
method_steps: Sandwich or thumbprint fill day-of so biscuit stays snap.

name: Mixed Filled Sandwiches
subtitle: Chef Selection
label: Mixed Sandwiches
method_steps: Finger sandwich spec 3 per serve, crustless optional per client.

name: Roasted Vegetable Salad Bowl
subtitle: Leaves · Dressing
label: Roast Veg Bowl
method_steps: Roast veg 200°C until caramelised, cool slightly.
Bowl: leaves, warm veg, drizzle dressing at send.

name: Chilli Garlic Prawns & Chorizo
subtitle: Rocket · Lemon
label: Prawns Chorizo
method_steps: PRAWNS: Pat dry. Hot pan with oil, sear prawns with garlic and chilli until just opaque.
CHORIZO: Render chorizo in separate pan until oil runs and edges crisp; combine with prawns or fold at toss.
TOSS: Finish with lemon squeeze, salt, toss through rocket off heat so rocket wilts lightly.
service: Warm platter or individual small plates; pass lemon separately for buffet.
note: Bar buffet / Riviera Table line item.

name: Slow Cooked Beef Albondigas
subtitle: Romesco Sugo · Toasted Turkish Bread
label: Beef Albondigas
method_steps: Mix mince, cooled onion, garlic, parmesan, eggs, crumbs, paprika, seasoning. Roll 45g balls.
Bake in deep tray covered with romesco at 150°C 45–55m until tender; hold in sauce.
Toast Turkish in oven between service waves.
service: Spoon meatballs + sugo into bowl; bread on side. Compare yield to veal meatballs card if standardising one mince spec.
note: Beef variant for buffet; romesco from house batch.

name: Heirloom Tomato Bruschetta
subtitle: Charred Sourdough · Whipped Goats Cheese
label: Tomato Bruschetta
method_steps: Whip goats cheese with cream until spreadable, season.
Toss tomatoes with salt, drain juices — reserve for vinaigrette if desired.
Build: bread, cheese, tomatoes, drizzle basil oil, cracked pepper.
service: Room temp pass; add salt at last second to keep tomatoes firm.
note: Dec 2025 bar buffet component.

name: Greek Style Pulled Beef
subtitle: Spiced · Lemon · Olive Oil
label: Greek Pulled Beef
method_steps: Rub beef with oil, lemon, oregano, cinnamon, garlic, salt. Marinate overnight.
Cover with stock, foil, 140°C 6–8h until pull-apart. Shred, moisten with reduced pan juices.
service: Buffet chafing with tongs; optional pita and tzatziki on separate card.
note: BBQ buffet mains line.

name: Chargrilled Lemon & Thyme Chicken
subtitle: Half or Supreme · Olive Oil
label: Lemon Thyme Chicken
method_steps: Marinate chicken 12h in oil, lemon, thyme, salt, pepper.
Chargrill skin-down until marked, finish 180°C oven to 74°C internal.
service: Slice for buffet; hold loosely tented — skin crisps at flash 220°C 3m if needed.
note: Distinct from lemon pepper skewer build; larger buffet cut.

name: Duo of Cannoli
subtitle: Pistachio White Chocolate · Strawberry Crumb
label: Duo Cannoli
method_steps: Split ricotta: half fold white chocolate + pistachio; half fold strawberry crumb + extra icing sugar.
Pipe each flavour into opposite ends or alternate trays labelled.
service: Plated dessert: two mini cannoli per plate, dust icing sugar.
note: Plated dinner menu line.

name: Strawberry Ricotta Cheesecake
subtitle: Freeze-dried Strawberries
label: Strawberry Cheesecake
method_steps: Press crumb base into lined tray, chill.
Beat cream cheese, ricotta, sugar, eggs, cream until smooth; fold strawberry. Bake 150°C water-bath style until set with slight wobble.
Chill overnight, portion with hot knife.
service: Plated with extra strawberry crumb and micro mint.

name: Riviera Tiramisu
subtitle: Biscotti Soil · Hazelnut Mousse
label: Riviera Tiramisu

ingredients.prep: yolks cooked sabayon style with sugar
or praline folded into half the cream

method_steps: Sabayon: whisk yolks and sugar over bain until 70°C, cool.
Fold mascarpone into sabayon, fold whipped cream in two stages.
Layer: soak sponge fingers in coffee mix, alternate cream, dust cocoa between layers. Top with hazelnut mousse quenelle and biscotti soil.
Set 12h minimum.
service: Cold plate; quenelle mousse at pass.
note: Plated menu wording — adjust alcohol per policy.

name: Kids Snack Pack
subtitle: Fruit · Crackers · Cheese · Treat
label: Kids Snack
method_steps: Assemble in labelled compostable box; allergen sticker if mixed site.
note: Kids pricing line from Dec menu — scale components per age band as needed.

name: Kids Spaghetti Bolognese
subtitle: Mild Ragu · Parmesan
label: Kids Spaghetti
method_steps: Sweat onion and garlic, brown mince, add passata, simmer 40m very mild — no chilli.
Toss pasta with a little sauce, serve extra in cup; parmesan at pass.
note: Kids meal example from Dec menu.

name: Bacon & Egg Muffins
subtitle: English Muffin · BBQ Sauce Option
label: Bacon Egg Muffin
method_steps: Build hot; wrap in foil for transport if corporate drop.
note: Corporate breakfast PDF line.

name: Bacon & Egg Paninis
subtitle: Turkish or Focaccia · Caramelised Onion Jam
label: Bacon Egg Panini
method_steps: Layer, press until marked and cheese flows; cut diagonal.

name: Waffles
subtitle: Maple · Whipped Honey Butter
label: Waffles
method_steps: Cook waffles to crisp, hold in low oven on rack — no stack steam.
Serve butter and maple separately.
note: Breakfast service — batter contains egg per house spec.

name: Creamy Basil Pesto Pasta Salad
subtitle: Spinach · Cherry Tomato · Olives
label: Pesto Pasta Salad
method_steps: Dress pasta with pesto and enough cream to coat; fold veg; season.
Hold chilled <5°C; refresh basil oil drizzle at send.
note: Corporate PDF salad line.

name: Moroccan Couscous Salad
subtitle: Roast Veg · Ras el Hanout · Lemon
label: Couscous Salad
method_steps: Toss warm couscous with oil, spice, lemon; cool; fold veg, parsley, almonds.

name: Pumpkin, Feta & Pepita Salad
subtitle: Honey · Greens
label: Pumpkin Feta Salad

ingredients.prep: dressing with lemon and olive oil

method_steps: Roast pumpkin 190°C until edges caramel; cool slightly.
Toss leaves with light dressing, top pumpkin, feta, pepitas.

name: Traditional Garden Salad
subtitle: Cucumber · Tomato · Vinaigrette
label: Garden Salad
method_steps: Dress at last minute; keep veg separate until send for crunch.

name: Creamy Potato, Bacon & Herb Salad
subtitle: Chives · Sour Cream Dressing
label: Potato Bacon Salad
method_steps: Fold potatoes with mayo, sour cream, chives; fold bacon just before service.
note: Hold cold; bacon separate if holding overnight.

name: Spinach & Ricotta Pastizzi Platter
subtitle: 20–25 pieces · Sauce
label: Pastizzi
method_steps: Bake pastizzi 190°C until flaky; hold warm 90m max in dry hot box.
Sauce in ramekin centre of platter.
note: Funeral / offsite hot nibble line.

name: Mixed Box Hot Nibbles
subtitle: Finger Food Selection · Sauces
label: Hot Nibbles Box
method_steps: Bake items per their cards until hot through; arrange in compartment box.
Sauces in sealed pots; label lid.
note: Uses existing house items where possible — counts per client sheet.
